inputs.prompt: Subject: Clearwater Analytics data breach — internal briefing. Audience: Senior leadership team. Key facts: Unauthorised access to one server detected on Monday at 2:15am by automated monitoring. Server contained financial data from 14 local authority clients. No evidence of data extraction. System patched within 4 hours. ICO notified Tuesday morning. Independent cybersecurity audit commissioned, report expected in 3 weeks. Two journalists have already called. Desired outcome: Align leadership on messaging and approve the holding statement. Sensitivity: Confidential.
Subject: Office move. Audience: All staff. Key facts: The company is moving offices from the current location to a new building on June 1. New address and logistics to follow. No action required yet.

Subject: Clinical trial adverse reaction — internal briefing. Audience: NHI Board of Directors. Key facts: On Wednesday at 14:30 CET, a participant in the NORDIC-CARE-3 clinical trial experienced a serious adverse reaction at a partner hospital. The participant is hospitalised and in stable condition. The trial has been paused in Denmark, Norway, and Sweden. National medicines agencies in all three countries notified within 6 hours. An independent review panel of three external clinicians has been convened. Media inquiries began Thursday morning. A holding statement was issued Thursday at 10am. Desired outcome: Board approval of the communications strategy and review panel terms of reference. Sensitivity: Strictly confidential — not for distribution beyond the Board.
